# iosxe_zone_pair_security (Resource)

This resource can manage the Zone Pair Security configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_zone_pair_security" "example" {
  name                        = "ZP_IN_OUT"
  source                      = "INSIDE"
  destination                 = "OUTSIDE"
  description                 = "Inside to outside traffic policy"
  service_policy_type_inspect = "PM_IN_TO_OUT"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination` (String) Destination zone
- `name` (String)
- `source` (String) Source zone

### Optional

- `description` (String) Zone description
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `service_policy_type_inspect` (String) Configure Zone Pair Service Policy type inspect

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_zone_pair_security.example "<name>"
```
